name: Archiver
short: Archive channels and categories, restore them perfectly.
description: Archive individual channels or entire categories into a restricted archive category. Snapshots all permissions, positions, topics, and metadata so everything can be restored exactly as it was.
author: you
install_msg: Use `[p]category create Archive` (or `category set`) to get started, then `[p]archive admins add <role>` to grant visibility.
